what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG hamburger menu icon made of three horizontal stroked line segments.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill.
Stroke color is set to currentColor, allowing the icon to inherit text color.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
A single path draws three horizontal bars at y positions 7, 12, and 17 from x=4 to x=20.
standouts: Single compact path encodes the full menu glyph.
The icon is color-themeable through currentColor.
conventions: Follows common inline SVG icon conventions with viewBox, currentColor, fill="none", and rounded strokes.
Uses path commands rather than separate line elements for the three bars.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria attributes are embedded in the SVG itself.
notes: This file is a minimal theme-inheriting hamburger menu SVG icon.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be handled by the SVG file or by the consuming UI element?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename/path indicate a menu icon, and the SVG draws a three-line menu glyph.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable menu/navigation icon that inherits surrounding color styling.
contribution: Contributes a compact, reusable hamburger menu glyph with inherited color and consistent rounded stroke styling.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 inline SVG hamburger menu icon composed of three horizontal currentColor strokes.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing a menu or navigation control in a reusable design-system icon asset.
